response.justification: Wei Chen is a strong senior individual contributor with deep experience in testing tools, CI/CD infrastructure, and developer tooling (test runners, assertion libraries, MCP code generators), which aligns well with the engineering-productivity domain. However, the role is fundamentally a people-management position requiring 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, conducting performance reviews, or owning team roadmaps. Mobile experience is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint a decade ago, well short of the mobile-platform ecosystem focus.
strengths: Extensive hands-on developer-tooling and test-infrastructure work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/GitLab setup, MCP generators)
15+ years of software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and coding dojos
concerns: No formal people-management experience (no direct reports, performance reviews, or team leadership roles)
No demonstrated organizational-change leadership or strategic roadmap ownership at team/org level
Mobile-platform experience is dated (2015-2016) and shallow relative to the role's mobile ecosystem focus

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure expertise
